mapper.select: SELECT bcr.id,bcr.fnumber,bcr.fname, bcr.fshort_name, bcr.f_khqc, bcr.fdescription, bcr.fcreate_org_id, ANY_VALUE(su.user_name) AS fcreator_id, ANY_VALUE(suer.user_name) AS fmodifier_id, ANY_VALUE(sel.fname) AS fseller, bcr.f_kfxsy1, bcr.fsal_dept_id, bcr.fsal_group_id, bcr.fcreate_date, bcr.fmodify_date, bcr.ffound_date, bcr.fdocumentStatus, ANY_VALUE(bydy.name) AS fcustTypeId, bcr.f_khzrrq, ANY_VALUE(cy.name_zh) AS fcountry, ANY_VALUE(cys.name_zh) AS f_dygj, bcr.fprovincial, bcr.faddress, bcr.fregister_address, bcr.ftel, bcr.f_khyx, bcr.fwebsite, ANY_VALUE(bdy.name) AS ftrading_curr_id, bcr.freceive_curr_id, bcr.fsettle_type_id, ANY_VALUE(bldy.name) AS frec_condition_id, bcr.fprice_list_id, bcr.ftax_type, bcr.ftax_rate, bcr.ftax_register_code, ANY_VALUE(byldy.name) AS fgroup_id, ANY_VALUE(bymldy.name) AS f_khly, bcr.f_sylx, bcr.f_khgm, bcr.f_khzy, bcr.fis_group, bcr.fis_def_payer, bcr.flegal_person, bcr.finvoice_type, bcr.f_bzyq, ANY_VALUE(ymate.name) AS fbzfs, bcr.f_fhyq, bcr.fapperober_date, ANY_VALUE(syuer.user_name) AS fapprover_id, ANY_VALUE(se.fname) AS fseller, bcr.f_zlbzhjsyq, bcr.f_sfysqs, bcr.fsbsq, bcr.fcmmttp1, bcr.zmmtwx, bcr.fcmmttp2, bcr.zmmtnx, bcr.fZmmttp1, bcr.fcmmtwx, bcr.fZmmttp2, bcr.fcmmtnx, bcr.fsfsd, bcr.fsfts, bcr.f_cty_decimal, bcr.f_tcfpfa, bcr.fpjskzq, bcr.f_mjll, bcr.f_cty_large_text, bcr.f_khlogo, bcr.fcp_admin_code, bcr.f_youtube, bcr.f_linkedin, bcr.f_facebook, bcr.f_twitter, bcr.f_instagram, bcr.f_vk, bcr.f_facebookmess, bcr.f_skype, bcr.f_whatsapp, bcr.fwechat, bcr.f_qq, bcr.ftn, bcr.f_yolo, bcr.f_hangouts, bcr.f_viber FROM bd_customer bcr LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON bcr.fcreator_id = su.k3_key LEFT JOIN sys_user suer ON bcr.fmodifier_id = suer.k3_key LEFT JOIN sys_user syuer ON bcr.fapprover_id = syuer.k3_key LEFT JOIN sys_employee sel ON bcr.fseller = sel.salesman_id LEFT JOIN country cy ON bcr.fcountry = cy.id LEFT JOIN country cys ON bcr.f_dygj = cys.id LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bdy ON bcr.ftrading_curr_id = bdy.kingdee AND bdy.category = 'currency' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bydy ON bcr.fcustTypeId = bydy.kingdee AND bydy.category = 'customer_category' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bldy ON bcr.frec_condition_id = bldy.kingdee AND bldy.category = 'collection_terms' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary byldy ON bcr.fgroup_id = byldy.kingdee AND byldy.category = 'Customer_grouping' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bymldy ON bcr.f_khly = bymldy.kingdee AND bymldy.category = 'customer_source' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary ymate ON bcr.fbzfs = ymate.kingdee AND ymate.category = 'manner_packing' LEFT JOIN sys_employee se ON bcr.fseller = se.salesman_id WHERE bcr.id = #{id} GROUP BY bcr.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bd_customer ( fnumber, fname, fdocumentStatus, fshort_name, f_khqc, fcreate_org_id, fcreator_id,fseller, f_kfxsy1, fsal_dept_id, fsal_group_id, f_dygj, fcountry, faddress, ftel, f_khyx, fwebsite, ftrading_curr_id, frec_condition_id, fgroup_id, f_khly, fbzfs,fsbsq,f_khzy,flegal_person,f_khgm, f_fhyq,f_cty_decimal,f_mjll,f_youtube,f_linkedin,f_facebook,f_twitter,f_instagram,f_vk,fcustTypeId,f_bzyq,fZmmttp1,fZmmttp2,fZmmttpMs,fcmmttp1,fcmmttp2,fCmmttpMs,f_khlogo,f_ly, fsettle_type_id,zmmtwx,zmmtnx,fcmmtwx,fcmmtnx,fcreate_date ) VALUES ( #{fnumber}, #{fname}, #{fdocumentStatus}, #{fshortName}, #{fKhqc}, #{fcreateOrgId}, #{fcreatorId}, #{fseller}, #{fKfxsy1}, #{fsalDeptId}, #{fsalGroupId}, #{fdygj}, #{fcountry}, #{faddress}, #{ftel}, #{fKhyx}, #{fwebsite}, #{ftradingCurrId}, #{frecConditionId}, #{fgroupId}, #{fKhly}, #{fBzfs},#{fsbsq},#{fKhzy}, #{flegalPerson},#{fKhgm},#{fFhyq},#{fCtyDecimal},#{fMjll},#{fYoutube},#{fLinkedin},#{fFacebook},#{fTwitter},#{fInstagram},#{fVk},#{fcustTypeId},#{fBzyq}, #{fZmmttp1},#{fZmmttp2},#{fZmmttpMs},#{fcmmttp1},#{fcmmttp2},#{fCmmttpMs},#{fKhlogo},#{fLy},#{fsettleTypeId},#{zmmtwx},#{zmmtnx},#{fcmmtwx},#{fcmmtnx},#{fcreateDate} )
mapper.update: UPDATE bd_customer SET fname = #{fname}, fshort_name = #{fshortName}, f_khqc = #{fKhqc}, f_khly = #{fKhly}, fcountry = #{fcountry}, f_dygj = #{fdygj}, fsbsq =#{fsbsq}, faddress = #{faddress}, fwebsite = #{fwebsite}, f_khzy = #{fKhzy}, flegal_person = #{flegalPerson}, f_khgm = #{fKhgm}, f_fhyq = #{fFhyq}, f_khyx = #{fKhyx}, ftel = #{ftel}, f_cty_decimal = #{fCtyDecimal}, f_mjll = #{fMjll}, fcustTypeId = #{fcustTypeId}, fgroup_id = #{fgroupId}, f_youtube = #{fYoutube}, f_linkedin = #{fLinkedin}, f_facebook = #{fFacebook}, f_twitter = #{fTwitter}, f_instagram = #{fInstagram}, f_vk = #{fVk}, f_khlogo = #{fKhlogo}, f_bzyq = #{fBzyq}, fbzfs = #{fBzfs}, fZmmttp1 = #{fZmmttp1}, fZmmttp2 = #{fZmmttp2}, fZmmttpMs = #{fZmmttpMs}, fcmmttp1 = #{fcmmttp1}, fcmmttp2 = #{fcmmttp2}, fCmmttpMs = #{fCmmttpMs}, ftrading_curr_id = #{ftradingCurrId}, fsettle_type_id = #{fsettleTypeId}, frec_condition_id = #{frecConditionId}, fseller = #{fseller}, f_kfxsy1 = #{fKfxsy1}, fmodify_date = NOW(), fmodifier_id = #{fmodifierId}, zmmtwx = #{zmmtwx}, zmmtnx = #{zmmtnx}, fcmmtwx = #{fcmmtwx}, fcmmtnx = #{fcmmtnx} WHERE Id = #{Id}
mapper.select: SELECT bcr.id,bcr.fnumber,bcr.fname,se.fname as fseller,bcr.fshort_name,bcr.f_cty_decimal, bcr.fdocumentStatus,c.name_zh as fcountry,cy.name_en as f_dygj,bcr.fsal_dept_id,d.dept_name as fsal_dept_name, bcr.fcreate_date,sr.user_name as fapprover_id,bcr.fapperober_date,b.name as fgroup_id, bdy.name as f_khly,bds.name as fcustTypeId,bcr.fmodify_date FROM bd_customer bcr LEFT JOIN sys_employee se ON bcr.fseller = se.salesman_id LEFT JOIN country c ON bcr.fcountry = c.id LEFT JOIN country cy ON bcr.f_dygj = cy.id LEFT JOIN sys_user sr ON bcr.fapprover_id = sr.k3_key LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON se.fid = su.staff_id LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON su.dept_id = d.dept_id LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary b ON bcr.fgroup_id = b.kingdee LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bdy ON bcr.f_khly = bdy.kingdee LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bds ON bcr.fcustTypeId = bds.kingdee ${ew.customSqlSegment}

SELECT bcr.id,bcr.fnumber,bcr.fname, bcr.fshort_name, bcr.f_khqc, bcr.fdescription, cy.name_zh as fcountry, coy.name_zh as f_dygj, bcr.fcreate_org_id, su.user_name AS fcreator_id, suer.user_name AS fmodifier_id, sel.fname AS fseller, bcr.f_kfxsy1, bcr.fsal_dept_id, bcr.fsal_group_id, bcr.fcreate_date, bcr.fmodify_date, bcr.ffound_date, bcr.fdocumentStatus, bydy.name AS fcustTypeId, bcr.f_khzrrq, cy.name_zh AS name_zh, bcr.fprovincial, bcr.faddress, bcr.fregister_address, bcr.ftel, bcr.f_khyx, bcr.fwebsite, bdy.name AS ftrading_curr_id, bcr.freceive_curr_id, bcr.fsettle_type_id, bldy.name AS frec_condition_id, bcr.fprice_list_id, bcr.ftax_type, bcr.ftax_rate, bcr.ftax_register_code, byldy.name AS fgroup_id, bymldy.name AS f_khly, bcr.f_sylx, bcr.f_khgm, bcr.f_ly, bcr.f_khzy, bcr.fis_group, bcr.fis_def_payer, bcr.flegal_person, bcr.finvoice_type, bcr.f_bzyq, ymate.name AS fbzfs, bcr.f_fhyq, bcr.fapperober_date, syuer.user_name AS fapprover_id, bcr.f_zlbzhjsyq, bcr.f_sfysqs, bcr.fsbsq, bcr.fcmmttp1, bcr.fcmmttp2, bcr.fCmmttpMs, bcr.fZmmttpMs, bcr.fZmmttp1, bcr.fZmmttp2, bcr.fsfsd, bcr.fsfts, bcr.f_cty_decimal, bcr.f_tcfpfa, bcr.fpjskzq, bcr.f_mjll, bcr.f_cty_large_text, bcr.f_khlogo, bcr.fcp_admin_code, bcr.f_youtube, bcr.f_linkedin, bcr.f_facebook, bcr.f_twitter, bcr.f_instagram, bcr.f_vk, bcr.f_facebookmess, bcr.f_skype, bcr.f_whatsapp, bcr.fwechat, bcr.f_qq, bcr.ftn, bcr.f_yolo, bcr.f_hangouts, bcr.f_viber FROM bd_customer bcr LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON bcr.fcreator_id = su.k3_key LEFT JOIN sys_user suer ON bcr.fmodifier_id = suer.k3_key LEFT JOIN sys_user syuer ON bcr.fapprover_id = syuer.k3_key LEFT JOIN sys_employee sel ON bcr.fseller = sel.salesman_id LEFT JOIN country cy ON bcr.fcountry = cy.id LEFT JOIN country coy ON bcr.f_dygj = coy.id LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bdy ON bcr.ftrading_curr_id = bdy.kingdee AND bdy.category = 'currency' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bydy ON bcr.fcustTypeId = bydy.kingdee AND bydy.category = 'customer_category' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bldy ON bcr.frec_condition_id = bldy.kingdee AND bldy.category = 'collection_terms' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary byldy ON bcr.fgroup_id = byldy.kingdee AND byldy.category = 'Customer_grouping' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bymldy ON bcr.f_khly = bymldy.kingdee AND bymldy.category = 'customer_source' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary ymate ON bcr.fbzfs = ymate.kingdee AND ymate.category = 'manner_packing' ${ew.customSqlSegment}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bd_customer bcr LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON bcr.fcreator_id = su.k3_key LEFT JOIN sys_user suer ON bcr.fmodifier_id = suer.k3_key LEFT JOIN sys_user syuer ON bcr.fapprover_id = syuer.k3_key LEFT JOIN sys_employee sel ON bcr.fseller = sel.salesman_id LEFT JOIN country cy ON bcr.fcountry = cy.id LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bdy ON bcr.ftrading_curr_id = bdy.kingdee AND bdy.category = 'currency' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bydy ON bcr.fcustTypeId = bydy.kingdee AND bydy.category = 'customer_category' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bldy ON bcr.frec_condition_id = bldy.kingdee AND bldy.category = 'collection_terms' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary byldy ON bcr.fgroup_id = byldy.kingdee AND byldy.category = 'Customer_grouping' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bymldy ON bcr.f_khly = bymldy.kingdee AND bymldy.category = 'customer_source' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary ymate ON bcr.fbzfs = ymate.kingdee AND ymate.category = 'manner_packing'
AND bcr.fname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customer.fname}, '%')
AND bcr.fnumber LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customer.fnumber}, '%')
AND bcr.fshort_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customer.fshortName}, '%')
AND fcountry = #{customer.fcountry}
AND fprovincial LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customer.fprovincial}, '%')
AND fseller = #{customer.fseller}

SELECT * FROM bd_customer
AND fname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customer.fname}, '%')
AND fnumber LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customer.fnumber}, '%')
AND fshort_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customer.fshortName}, '%')
AND fcountry = #{customer.fcountry}
AND fprovincial LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customer.fprovincial}, '%')
AND ftel LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customer.ftel}, '%')
AND f_khyx LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customer.fKhyx}, '%')
AND fgroup_id = #{customer.fgroupId}
AND fseller = #{customer.fseller}
ORDER BY fcreate_date DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE bd_customer SET fnumber = #{fnumber}, fname = #{fname}, fshort_name = #{fshortName}, f_khqc = #{fKhqc}, fdescription = #{fdescription}, fcreate_org_id = #{fcreateOrgId}, fmodifier_id = #{fmodifierId}, fseller = #{fseller}, f_kfxsy1 = #{fKfxsy1}, fsal_dept_id = #{fsalDeptId}, fsal_group_id = #{fsalGroupId}, fmodify_date = #{fmodifyDate}, ffound_date = #{ffoundDate}, f_khzrrq = #{fKhzrrq}, fdocumentstatus = #{fdocumentStatus}, fcusttypeid = #{fcustTypeId}, f_dygj = #{fdygj}, fapperober_date = #{fapperoberDate}, fapprover_id = #{fapproverId}, fcountry = #{fcountry}, fprovincial = #{fprovincial}, faddress = #{faddress}, fregister_address = #{fregisterAddress}, ftel = #{ftel}, f_khyx = #{fKhyx}, fwebsite = #{fwebsite}, ftrading_curr_id = #{ftradingCurrId}, freceive_curr_id = #{freceiveCurrId}, fsettle_type_id = #{fsettleTypeId}, frec_condition_id = #{frecConditionId}, fprice_list_id = #{fpriceListId}, ftax_type = #{ftaxType}, ftax_rate = #{ftaxRate}, ftax_register_code = #{ftaxRegisterCode}, fgroup_id = #{fgroupId}, f_khly = #{fKhly}, f_ly = #{fLy}, f_sylx = #{fSylx}, f_khgm = #{fKhgm}, f_khzy = #{fKhzy}, fis_group = #{fisGroup}, fis_def_payer = #{fisDefPayer}, flegal_person = #{flegalPerson}, finvoice_type = #{finvoiceType}, fsupplier_id = #{fsupplierId}, f_bzyq = #{fBzyq}, fbzfs = #{fBzfs}, f_fhyq = #{fFhyq}, f_zlbzhjsyq = #{fZlbzhjsyq}, f_sfysqs = #{fSfysqs}, fsbsq = #{fsbsq}, fsfsd = #{fsfsd}, fsfts = #{fsfts}, f_cty_decimal = #{fCtyDecimal}, f_tcfpfa = #{fTcfpfa}, fpjskzq = #{fpjskzq}, f_mjll = #{fMjll}, f_cty_large_text = #{fCtyLargeText}, f_khlogo = #{fKhlogo}, fcp_admin_code = #{fcpAdminCode}, f_youtube = #{fYoutube}, f_linkedin = #{fLinkedin}, f_facebook = #{fFacebook}, f_twitter = #{fTwitter}, f_instagram = #{fInstagram}, f_vk = #{fVk}, f_facebookmess = #{fFacebookmess}, f_skype = #{fSkype}, f_whatsapp = #{fWhatsapp}, fZmmttp1 = #{fZmmttp1}, fZmmttp2 = #{fZmmttp2}, fZmmttpMs = #{fZmmttpMs}, fcmmttp1 = #{fcmmttp1}, fcmmttp2 = #{fcmmttp2}, fCmmttpMs = #{fCmmttpMs}, fwechat = #{fwechat}, f_qq = #{fQq}, ftn = #{ftn}, f_yolo = #{fYolo}, f_hangouts = #{fHangouts}, f_viber = #{fViber} WHERE fcustid = #{fcustid}
